---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement.
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

**What you'd like**

A clear description of the feature.

**Why it matters**

The use case this unlocks. Be concrete — "I want to dictate code comments in VS Code while my hands stay on the keyboard" is more useful than "more flexibility."

**Alternatives considered**

What you've tried instead, or other tools that solve this.

**Scope check**

Susurro aims to stay under ~800 lines of Python and avoid feature creep. Does this fit? If it adds significant surface area, what could be left out?
